DARIUS ACUFF basketball player profile


Darius Acuff is USA basketball player born on November 16 2006 in Detroit, MI. He is a 6'2'' guard who most recently played at The University of Arkansas in the NCAA. Acuff is represented by WME Sports agency.
  • Add Twitter

Frequently Asked Questions

Where was Darius Acuff born?

Darius Acuff was born in Detroit, MI.

When was Darius Acuff born?

Darius Acuff was born on Nov.16, 2006.

How tall is Darius Acuff?

Darius Acuff is 188cm / 6'2'' tall.

How much did Darius Acuff weigh when playing?

Darius Acuff weighed 82kg / 180.4lbs when playing.

Is Darius Acuff in the Hall of Fame?

Darius Acuff is not in the Hall of Fame.

What position did Darius Acuff play?

Guard.

What highschool did Darius Acuff attend?

Darius Acuff attended IMG Academy '2025.

Who is agent of Darius Acuff?

Darius Acuff's agent is Bill Duffy.

German: Darius Acuff basketball statistiken

Chinese : Darius Acuff 篮球 统计数据

Korean : Darius Acuff 농구 통계
